reviews.comment:
Creo que sus propietarios están haciendo patria en un lugar inhóspito. Es importante esta estación de servicio porque se encuentra entre Trelew y Comodoro Rivadavia, brindando un servicio imprescindible para los vehículos que necesitan cargar nafta o gasoil entre estas dos ciudades. En época turística hay que ir con paciencia y hacer cola. No hay que confiarse porque a veces se termina el combustible y hay que esperar la reposición

(Translated by Google)
I believe its owners are doing their part in a remote and difficult place. This gas station is important because it's located between Trelew and Comodoro Rivadavia, providing an essential service for vehicles that need to refuel between these two cities. During tourist season, you have to be patient and wait in line. Don't get too comfortable because sometimes they run out of fuel and you have to wait for it to be restocked.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3dWZuZ1VnEAE

reviews.comment:
Dejamos olvidado un peluchito de mi hija, al percatarnos del hecho llamé y me dijeron que lo tenían y que por mi pedido x recuperalo le pondrían un cartel con mis datos de contacto y q tratarían que alguien lo traiga a Gallegos, gracias a estos chicos Nam volvió a mi hija...eternamente agradecida a los chicos q el 2o/01/18 estaban de turno y se preocuparon. Excelentes personas!!

(Translated by Google)
We left behind one of my daughter's stuffed animals. When we realized, I called and they told me they had it and that, because I asked for it back, they would put a sign with my contact information on it and try to get someone to bring it to Gallegos. Thanks to these guys, Nam was returned to my daughter... eternally grateful to the guys who were on duty on January 2nd, 2018, and who took care of it. Excellent people!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRaWNhS05BEAE
